staticMemories: This is the user's dotfiles configuration repository. All AI agent behaviors (hooks, skills, commands, rules) are managed here and apply globally via symlinks.
pctx gateway config is at ~/.config/pctx/pctx.json (tracked in .config/pctx/pctx.json in this repo). All MCP traffic routes through pctx.
All changes to ai/rules/, ai/skills/, ai/commands/ apply user-globally across all projects via setup.sh symlinks.
Never commit to main. Use stack branches (.trees/<name>) and the stack-pr skill for PRs.
The pre-tool-gate-v2.sh hook requires pctx session init before any Grep/Read/Glob calls.
